category.scope_note: Water electrolyzer for green hydrogen comparison.

title.en: China-to-US Water Electrolyzer Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电解水制氢设备进入美国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電解水製氫設備進入美國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China water electrolyzer documentation against US ASME, NFPA hydrogen, NRTL listing, electrical, pressure, and site-permitting expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电解水制氢设备文件与美国 ASME、NFPA 氢能、NRTL 列名、电气、压力和场地许可要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電解水製氫設備文件與美國 ASME、NFPA 氫能、NRTL 列名、電氣、壓力和場地許可要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRTL assessment, pressure-vessel approval, fire-code approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current US federal, state, ASME, NFPA, electrical, pressure, fire-code, site-permitting, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRTL 评审、压力容器批准、消防规范批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行美国联邦、州、ASME、NFPA、电气、压力、消防规范、场地许可及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRTL 評審、壓力容器批准、消防規範批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行美國聯邦、州、ASME、NFPA、電氣、壓力、消防規範、場地許可及安裝要求。

answer_first.en: ASME pressure stamp, NFPA 2 Hydrogen Technologies Code, and NRTL listing are the main gaps.
answer_first.zh: ASME 压力钢印、NFPA 2 氢技术规范，以及 NRTL 列名是主要差距。
answer_first.zht: ASME 壓力鋼印、NFPA 2 氫技術規範，以及 NRTL 列名是主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, NRTL, fire-code authority, pressure-equipment authority, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
